meta.title: Heartway — Dating that feels human
meta.description: Connect with Mongols across North America — dating, community forum, and stories about life abroad.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: The community app built for us — meet people who share your language and story, swap advice on the forum, and read honest blogs about life abroad.
landing.featureSwipeDesc: Pass, like, or super like profiles in a smooth card stack on any device.
landing.featurePromptsDesc: Answer prompts so others can like a specific photo or answer — Hinge-style depth.
landing.featureSafetyDesc: Report harassment, block bad actors, and control who can message you.
landing.featureBlogDesc: Articles on dating and living abroad, plus a forum to ask questions and help each other — in English, Mongolian, and traditional script.

auth.name: Display name
auth.invalidCredentialsHint: Wrong email or password. Use the exact email you signed up with, or reset your password below.
auth.sessionFailed: Login did not complete. Try again or reset your password.
auth.signupSuccess: Account created. Complete your profile, then fill out the matchmaking questionnaire.
auth.noVerificationEmail: We don't send confirmation emails. Use the password you chose at signup.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your account email and a new password. No email is sent — this updates your password immediately.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can log in now.
auth.resetNotFound: No account found with that email.
auth.resetFailed: Could not reset password. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.womenMessageFirstHint: In new matches, only women can send the first message until they reply.

discover.title: Discover
discover.loadingHint: First load in dev mode can take 10–30 seconds. The “Rendering” badge at the bottom is normal.
discover.noMore: No more profiles nearby. Check back later or widen your filters.
discover.commentPlaceholder: Add a comment with your like (optional)
discover.paused: Your profile is paused. Turn discovery back on in settings.

matches.title: Matches
matches.empty: No matches yet. When we send you a curated intro and you both accept, they'll appear here.

matchmaking.title: Curated matchmaking
matchmaking.subtitle: Personal intros for Mongols worldwide — starting in {city}, open to matches across countries.
matchmaking.statusHint: Our team is reviewing profiles to find thoughtful matches.
matchmaking.queueHint: You're not alone — {count} members are in the matchmaking queue. We typically send curated intros within a few weeks.
matchmaking.swipeLater: Swipe discover will open when enough members join your area.

intake.title: Matchmaking questionnaire
intake.intro: Answer honestly — only Heartway staff see your full answers. We hand-pick intros locally or internationally when you're open to it.
intake.lookingForLabel: What are you looking for? (select all that apply)
intake.yearsInMongoliaHint: Total years you've lived in Mongolia (can be 0 if born abroad).
intake.lifestylePlaceholder: Gym, cooking, hiking, gaming, family time…
intake.matchScope: Where should we look for matches?
intake.openToLongDistance: Open to long-distance for 6+ months (video dates first)
intake.willingToRelocate: Willing to relocate for the right person
intake.dealbreakersLabel: Hard dealbreakers (I don't want someone who…)
intake.dealbreakersOther: Other — specify my own dealbreakers below
intake.customDealbreakersPlaceholder: One dealbreaker per line, e.g. "Works night shifts", "Doesn't want pets"…

dealbreakers.HAS_CHILDREN: Has children (if that's not OK for me)
dealbreakers.DIFFERENT_FAITH: Requires a different faith than mine

intake.whatYouWant: In your own words, what kind of person and relationship do you want?
intake.whatYouWantPlaceholder: Be specific — values, communication style, what a good partnership looks like to you…
intake.consentNote: By submitting, you agree that Heartway staff may read your answers to suggest curated intros. We never share your full questionnaire with other members.
intake.submitError: Could not save. Check required fields and try again.

intro.waitingForOther: You accepted — waiting for their response.

adminMatchmaking.title: Matchmaking admin
adminMatchmaking.introNotePlaceholder: Explain why you paired them — both members will see this note…

messages.title: Messages
messages.waitingForHer: She messages first in this match.
messages.waitingForHim: He messages first in this match.
messages.unlockHint: The other person must send the first message in this match.

report.title: Report user
report.success: Thank you. Our team will review this report.

blog.title: Stories & guides
blog.subtitle: Dating, friendship, and real talk about Mongolian life in North America — living alone abroad, finding your people, and more.

forum.title: Community forum
forum.subtitle: Ask questions, share tips, and help fellow Mongols in Canada, the U.S., and beyond.
forum.newTopicHint: Be kind and specific. Topics about moving, work, family, dating, and culture are welcome.
forum.empty: No discussions yet. Start the first topic!
forum.topicBodyPlaceholder: What would you like to discuss?
forum.createError: Could not create topic. Check title and body length.

adminHub.title: Admin
adminHub.subtitle: Manage blog, forum, and curated matchmaking.

adminForum.title: Forum admin
adminForum.deleteConfirm: Delete this topic and all replies?

prompts.green_flag: A green flag I look for is…
